f: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₂, X₃ ⟧
h: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₃, X₄ ⟧
fX₁: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₁
fX₂: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₂
fX₃: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₃
fX₄: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₄
pf: fX₁ -->[ f] fX₂
pg: fX₂ -->[ g] fX₃
ph: fX₃ -->[ h] fX₄
((pr2 f ◃ (pr2 g ◃ pr1 ph))
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h · fX₄))
• lassociator (pr2 f · pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄ =
(((pr2 f ◃ (pr2 g ◃ pr1 ph))
  • (pr2 f ◃ lassociator (pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄))
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g · pr2 h) fX₄)
• (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h) ▹ fX₄)

      
B: bicat
X₁, X₂, X₃, X₄: prod_bicat B B
f: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₂, X₃ ⟧
h: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₃, X₄ ⟧
fX₁: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₁
fX₂: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₂
fX₃: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₃
fX₄: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₄
pf: fX₁ -->[ f] fX₂
pg: fX₂ -->[ g] fX₃
ph: fX₃ -->[ h] fX₄
(pr2 f ◃ (pr2 g ◃ pr1 ph))
• (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h · fX₄)
   • lassociator (pr2 f · pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄) =
(pr2 f ◃ (pr2 g ◃ pr1 ph))
• ((pr2 f ◃ lassociator (pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄)
   • (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g · pr2 h) fX₄
      • (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h) ▹ fX₄)))

      
B: bicat
X₁, X₂, X₃, X₄: prod_bicat B B
f: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₂, X₃ ⟧
h: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₃, X₄ ⟧
fX₁: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₁
fX₂: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₂
fX₃: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₃
fX₄: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₄
pf: fX₁ -->[ f] fX₂
pg: fX₂ -->[ g] fX₃
ph: fX₃ -->[ h] fX₄
lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h · fX₄)
• lassociator (pr2 f · pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄ =
(pr2 f ◃ lassociator (pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄)
• (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g · pr2 h) fX₄
   • (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h) ▹ fX₄))

      
B: bicat
X₁, X₂, X₃, X₄: prod_bicat B B
f: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₂, X₃ ⟧
h: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₃, X₄ ⟧
fX₁: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₁
fX₂: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₂
fX₃: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₃
fX₄: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₄
pf: fX₁ -->[ f] fX₂
pg: fX₂ -->[ g] fX₃
ph: fX₃ -->[ h] fX₄
((pr2 f ◃ lassociator (pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄)
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g · pr2 h) fX₄)
• (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h) ▹ fX₄) =
(pr2 f ◃ lassociator (pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄)
• (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g · pr2 h) fX₄
   • (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h) ▹ fX₄))

      
B: bicat
X₁, X₂, X₃, X₄: prod_bicat B B
f: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₁, X₂ ⟧
g: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₂, X₃ ⟧
h: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X₃, X₄ ⟧
fX₁: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₁
fX₂: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₂
fX₃: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₃
fX₄: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X₄
pf: fX₁ -->[ f] fX₂
pg: fX₂ -->[ g] fX₃
ph: fX₃ -->[ h] fX₄
((pr2 f ◃ lassociator (pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄)
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g · pr2 h) fX₄)
• (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h) ▹ fX₄) =
((pr2 f ◃ lassociator (pr2 g) (pr2 h) fX₄)
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g · pr2 h) fX₄)
• (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g) (pr2 h) ▹ fX₄)

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b : prod_bicat B B)
(f g h : prod_bicat B B ⟦ a, b ⟧) (r : f ==> g)
(s : g ==> h)
(x : cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg : x -->[ g] y)
(hh : x -->[ h] y),
ff ==>[ r] gg → gg ==>[ s] hh → ff ==>[ r • s] hh
 
B: bicat
X, Y: prod_bicat B B
f, g, h: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
p: f ==> g
q: g ==> h
fX: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X
fY: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells Y
pf: fX -->[ f] fY
pg: fX -->[ g] fY
ph: fX -->[ h] fY
pp: pf ==>[ p] pg
pq: pg ==>[ q] ph
pf ==>[ p • q] ph

      
B: bicat
X, Y: ∑ _ : B, B
f, g, h: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f g
q: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y g h
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fY)
ph: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 h) (pr2 h · fY)
pp: pr1 pf • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg
pq: pr1 pg • (pr2 q ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 q) • pr1 ph
pr1 pf • ((pr2 p • pr2 q) ▹ fY) =
(fX ◃ (pr1 p • pr1 q)) • pr1 ph

      
B: bicat
X, Y: ∑ _ : B, B
f, g, h: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f g
q: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y g h
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fY)
ph: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 h) (pr2 h · fY)
pp: pr1 pf • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg
pq: pr1 pg • (pr2 q ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 q) • pr1 ph
pr1 pf • ((pr2 p ▹ fY) • (pr2 q ▹ fY)) =
(fX ◃ (pr1 p • pr1 q)) • pr1 ph

      
B: bicat
X, Y: ∑ _ : B, B
f, g, h: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f g
q: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y g h
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fY)
ph: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 h) (pr2 h · fY)
pp: pr1 pf • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg
pq: pr1 pg • (pr2 q ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 q) • pr1 ph
(pr1 pf • (pr2 p ▹ fY)) • (pr2 q ▹ fY) =
(fX ◃ (pr1 p • pr1 q)) • pr1 ph

      
B: bicat
X, Y: ∑ _ : B, B
f, g, h: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f g
q: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y g h
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fY)
ph: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 h) (pr2 h · fY)
pp: pr1 pf • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg
pq: pr1 pg • (pr2 q ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 q) • pr1 ph
((fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg) • (pr2 q ▹ fY) =
(fX ◃ (pr1 p • pr1 q)) • pr1 ph

      
B: bicat
X, Y: ∑ _ : B, B
f, g, h: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f g
q: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y g h
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fY)
ph: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 h) (pr2 h · fY)
pp: pr1 pf • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg
pq: pr1 pg • (pr2 q ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 q) • pr1 ph
(fX ◃ pr1 p) • (pr1 pg • (pr2 q ▹ fY)) =
(fX ◃ (pr1 p • pr1 q)) • pr1 ph

      
B: bicat
X, Y: ∑ _ : B, B
f, g, h: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f g
q: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y g h
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fY)
ph: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 h) (pr2 h · fY)
pp: pr1 pf • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg
pq: pr1 pg • (pr2 q ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 q) • pr1 ph
(fX ◃ pr1 p) • ((fX ◃ pr1 q) • pr1 ph) =
(fX ◃ (pr1 p • pr1 q)) • pr1 ph

      
B: bicat
X, Y: ∑ _ : B, B
f, g, h: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f g
q: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y g h
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fY)
ph: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 h) (pr2 h · fY)
pp: pr1 pf • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg
pq: pr1 pg • (pr2 q ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 q) • pr1 ph
((fX ◃ pr1 p) • (fX ◃ pr1 q)) • pr1 ph =
(fX ◃ (pr1 p • pr1 q)) • pr1 ph

      
B: bicat
X, Y: ∑ _ : B, B
f, g, h: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f g
q: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y g h
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fY)
ph: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 h) (pr2 h · fY)
pp: pr1 pf • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg
pq: pr1 pg • (pr2 q ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 q) • pr1 ph
(fX ◃ pr1 p) • (fX ◃ pr1 q) = fX ◃ (pr1 p • pr1 q)

      apply lwhisker_vcomp.
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b c : prod_bicat B B)
(f : prod_bicat B B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g1 g2 : prod_bicat B B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : g1 ==> g2)
(x : cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff : x -->[ f] y) (gg1 : y -->[ g1] z)
(gg2 : y -->[ g2] z),
gg1 ==>[ r] gg2 → ff ;; gg1 ==>[ f ◃ r] ff ;; gg2
 
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: prod_bicat B B
f: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: prod_bicat B B ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
p: g₁ ==> g₂
fX: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X
fY: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells Y
fZ: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells Z
pf: fX -->[ f] fY
pg₁: fY -->[ g₁] fZ
pg₂: fY -->[ g₂] fZ
pp: pg₁ ==>[ p] pg₂
pf ;; pg₁ ==>[ f ◃ p] pf ;; pg₂

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
((((lassociator fX (pr1 f) (pr1 g₁)
    • (pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁))
   • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁))
  • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁))
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ)
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ) =
(fX ◃ (pr1 f ◃ pr1 p))
• ((((lassociator fX (pr1 f) (pr1 g₂)
      • (pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₂))
     • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂))
    • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂))
   • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
((((lassociator fX (pr1 f) (pr1 g₁)
    • (pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁))
   • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁))
  • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁))
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ)
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ) =
(((((fX ◃ (pr1 f ◃ pr1 p))
    • lassociator fX (pr1 f) (pr1 g₂))
   • (pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₂))
  • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂))
 • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂))
• lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
((((lassociator fX (pr1 f) (pr1 g₁)
    • (pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁))
   • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁))
  • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁))
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ)
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ) =
((((lassociator fX (pr1 f) (pr1 g₁)
    • (fX · pr1 f ◃ pr1 p)) • (pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₂))
  • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂))
 • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂))
• lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
lassociator fX (pr1 f) (pr1 g₁)
• ((pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁)
   • (rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁)
      • ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁)
         • (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ
            • ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ))))) =
lassociator fX (pr1 f) (pr1 g₁)
• ((fX · pr1 f ◃ pr1 p)
   • ((pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₂)
      • (rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂)
         • ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂)
            • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ))))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
(pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁)
• (rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁)
   • ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁)
      • (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ
         • ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ)))) =
(fX · pr1 f ◃ pr1 p)
• ((pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₂)
   • (rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂)
      • ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂)
         • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ)))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
((((pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁) • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁))
  • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁))
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ)
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ) =
((((fX · pr1 f ◃ pr1 p) • (pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₂))
  • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂))
 • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂))
• lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
((((pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁) • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁))
  • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁))
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ)
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ) =
((((pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁) • (pr2 f · fY ◃ pr1 p))
  • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂))
 • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂))
• lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
(pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁)
• (rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁)
   • ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁)
      • (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ
         • ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ)))) =
(pr1 pf ▹ pr1 g₁)
• ((pr2 f · fY ◃ pr1 p)
   • (rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂)
      • ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂)
         • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ)))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁)
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁)
   • (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ
      • ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ))) =
(pr2 f · fY ◃ pr1 p)
• (rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂)
   • ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂)
      • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
((rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁) • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁))
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ)
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ) =
(((pr2 f · fY ◃ pr1 p)
  • rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₂))
 • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂))
• lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
((rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁) • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁))
 • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ)
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ) =
((rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁)
  • (pr2 f ◃ (fY ◃ pr1 p))) • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂))
• lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁)
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁)
   • (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ
      • ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ))) =
rassociator (pr2 f) fY (pr1 g₁)
• ((pr2 f ◃ (fY ◃ pr1 p))
   • ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂)
      • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
(pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁)
• (lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₁) fZ
   • ((pr2 f ◃ pr2 p) ▹ fZ)) =
(pr2 f ◃ (fY ◃ pr1 p))
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂) • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
(pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁)
• ((pr2 f ◃ (pr2 p ▹ fZ))
   • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ) =
(pr2 f ◃ (fY ◃ pr1 p))
• ((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂) • lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
((pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁) • (pr2 f ◃ (pr2 p ▹ fZ)))
• lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ =
((pr2 f ◃ (fY ◃ pr1 p)) • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂))
• lassociator (pr2 f) (pr2 g₂) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
(pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₁) • (pr2 f ◃ (pr2 p ▹ fZ)) =
(pr2 f ◃ (fY ◃ pr1 p)) • (pr2 f ◃ pr1 pg₂)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
pr2 f ◃ (pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ)) =
pr2 f ◃ ((fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g₁, g₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) Y Z g₁ g₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f) (pr2 f · fY)
pg₁: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₁) (pr2 g₁ · fZ)
pg₂: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g₂) (pr2 g₂ · fZ)
pp: pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂
pr1 pg₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fZ) = (fY ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pg₂

      exact pp.
    
B: bicat
∏ (a b c : prod_bicat B B)
(f1 f2 : prod_bicat B B ⟦ a, b ⟧)
(g : prod_bicat B B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (r : f1 ==> f2)
(x : cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells a)
(y : cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells b)
(z : cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells c)
(ff1 : x -->[ f1] y) (ff2 : x -->[ f2] y)
(gg : y -->[ g] z),
ff1 ==>[ r] ff2 → ff1 ;; gg ==>[ r ▹ g] ff2 ;; gg
 
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: prod_bicat B B
f₁, f₂: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
g: prod_bicat B B ⟦ Y, Z ⟧
p: f₁ ==> f₂
fX: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells X
fY: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells Y
fZ: cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells Z
pf₁: fX -->[ f₁] fY
pf₂: fX -->[ f₂] fY
pg: fY -->[ g] fZ
pp: pf₁ ==>[ p] pf₂
pf₁ ;; pg ==>[ p ▹ g] pf₂ ;; pg

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
((((lassociator fX (pr1 f₁) (pr1 g)
    • (pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g))
   • rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g))
  • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg))
 • lassociator (pr2 f₁) (pr2 g) fZ)
• ((pr2 p ▹ pr2 g) ▹ fZ) =
(fX ◃ (pr1 p ▹ pr1 g))
• ((((lassociator fX (pr1 f₂) (pr1 g)
      • (pr1 pf₂ ▹ pr1 g))
     • rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g))
    • (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg))
   • lassociator (pr2 f₂) (pr2 g) fZ)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
((((lassociator fX (pr1 f₁) (pr1 g)
    • (pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g))
   • rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g))
  • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg))
 • lassociator (pr2 f₁) (pr2 g) fZ)
• ((pr2 p ▹ pr2 g) ▹ fZ) =
(((((fX ◃ (pr1 p ▹ pr1 g))
    • lassociator fX (pr1 f₂) (pr1 g))
   • (pr1 pf₂ ▹ pr1 g))
  • rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g))
 • (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg))
• lassociator (pr2 f₂) (pr2 g) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
((((lassociator fX (pr1 f₁) (pr1 g)
    • (pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g))
   • rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g))
  • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg))
 • lassociator (pr2 f₁) (pr2 g) fZ)
• ((pr2 p ▹ pr2 g) ▹ fZ) =
((((lassociator fX (pr1 f₁) (pr1 g)
    • ((fX ◃ pr1 p) ▹ pr1 g)) • (pr1 pf₂ ▹ pr1 g))
  • rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g))
 • (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg))
• lassociator (pr2 f₂) (pr2 g) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
lassociator fX (pr1 f₁) (pr1 g)
• ((pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g)
   • (rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
      • ((pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg)
         • (lassociator (pr2 f₁) (pr2 g) fZ
            • ((pr2 p ▹ pr2 g) ▹ fZ))))) =
lassociator fX (pr1 f₁) (pr1 g)
• (((fX ◃ pr1 p) ▹ pr1 g)
   • ((pr1 pf₂ ▹ pr1 g)
      • (rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g)
         • ((pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)
            • lassociator (pr2 f₂) (pr2 g) fZ))))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
(pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
   • ((pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg)
      • (lassociator (pr2 f₁) (pr2 g) fZ
         • ((pr2 p ▹ pr2 g) ▹ fZ)))) =
((fX ◃ pr1 p) ▹ pr1 g)
• ((pr1 pf₂ ▹ pr1 g)
   • (rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g)
      • ((pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)
         • lassociator (pr2 f₂) (pr2 g) fZ)))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
(pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
   • ((pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg)
      • ((pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ)
         • lassociator (pr2 f₂) (pr2 g) fZ))) =
((fX ◃ pr1 p) ▹ pr1 g)
• ((pr1 pf₂ ▹ pr1 g)
   • (rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g)
      • ((pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)
         • lassociator (pr2 f₂) (pr2 g) fZ)))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
((((pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g) • rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g))
  • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg)) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ))
• lassociator (pr2 f₂) (pr2 g) fZ =
(((((fX ◃ pr1 p) ▹ pr1 g) • (pr1 pf₂ ▹ pr1 g))
  • rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g))
 • (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg))
• lassociator (pr2 f₂) (pr2 g) fZ

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
(((pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g) • rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g))
 • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg)) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ) =
((((fX ◃ pr1 p) ▹ pr1 g) • (pr1 pf₂ ▹ pr1 g))
 • rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g))
• (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
(((pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g) • rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g))
 • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg)) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ) =
((((fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂) ▹ pr1 g)
 • rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g))
• (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
(((pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g) • rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g))
 • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg)) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ) =
(((pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY)) ▹ pr1 g)
 • rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g))
• (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
(((pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g) • rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g))
 • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg)) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ) =
(((pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g) • ((pr2 p ▹ fY) ▹ pr1 g))
 • rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g))
• (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
(pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
   • ((pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ))) =
(pr1 pf₁ ▹ pr1 g)
• (((pr2 p ▹ fY) ▹ pr1 g)
   • (rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g)
      • (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
• ((pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ)) =
((pr2 p ▹ fY) ▹ pr1 g)
• (rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g) • (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
(rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g) • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg))
• (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ) =
(((pr2 p ▹ fY) ▹ pr1 g)
 • rassociator (pr2 f₂) fY (pr1 g))
• (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
(rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g) • (pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg))
• (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ) =
(rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
 • (pr2 p ▹ fY · pr1 g)) • (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg)

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
• ((pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ)) =
rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
• ((pr2 p ▹ fY · pr1 g) • (pr2 f₂ ◃ pr1 pg))

      
B: bicat
X, Y, Z: ∑ _ : B, B
f₁, f₂: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 X, pr1 Y ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 X, pr2 Y ⟧
g: ∑ _ : B ⟦ pr1 Y, pr1 Z ⟧, B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr2 Z ⟧
p: total_prebicat_cell_struct
  (trivial_displayed_prebicat B B) X Y f₁ f₂
fX: B ⟦ pr2 X, pr1 X ⟧
fY: B ⟦ pr2 Y, pr1 Y ⟧
fZ: B ⟦ pr2 Z, pr1 Z ⟧
pf₁: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₁) (pr2 f₁ · fY)
pf₂: invertible_2cell (fX · pr1 f₂) (pr2 f₂ · fY)
pg: invertible_2cell (fY · pr1 g) (pr2 g · fZ)
pp: pr1 pf₁ • (pr2 p ▹ fY) = (fX ◃ pr1 p) • pr1 pf₂
rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
• ((pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ)) =
rassociator (pr2 f₁) fY (pr1 g)
• ((pr2 f₁ ◃ pr1 pg) • (pr2 p ▹ pr2 g · fZ))

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
disp_prebicat_data (prod_bicat B B)

  
B: bicat
disp_prebicat_data (prod_bicat B B)

    
B: bicat
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells (prod_bicat B B)
B: bicat
(λ D : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells (prod_bicat B B),
 disp_prebicat_ops D) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells (prod_bicat B B)
 exact cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells.
    
B: bicat
(λ D : disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells (prod_bicat B B),
 disp_prebicat_ops D)
  cod_disp_prebicat_1_id_comp_cells
 exact cod_disp_prebicat_ops.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
disp_prebicat_laws cod_disp_prebicat_data

  
B: bicat
disp_prebicat_laws cod_disp_prebicat_data

    repeat split ; intro ; intros ; apply B.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
disp_prebicat (prod_bicat B B)

  
B: bicat
disp_prebicat (prod_bicat B B)

    
B: bicat
disp_prebicat_data (prod_bicat B B)
B: bicat
(λ D : disp_prebicat_data (prod_bicat B B),
 disp_prebicat_laws D) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
disp_prebicat_data (prod_bicat B B)
 exact cod_disp_prebicat_data.
    
B: bicat
(λ D : disp_prebicat_data (prod_bicat B B),
 disp_prebicat_laws D) cod_disp_prebicat_data
 exact cod_disp_prebicat_laws.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
has_disp_cellset cod_disp_prebicat

  
B: bicat
has_disp_cellset cod_disp_prebicat

    
B: bicat
X, Y: prod_bicat B B
f, g: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
p: f ==> g
fX: cod_disp_prebicat X
fY: cod_disp_prebicat Y
pf: fX -->[ f] fY
pg: fX -->[ g] fY
isaset (pf ==>[ p] pg)

    
B: bicat
X, Y: prod_bicat B B
f, g: prod_bicat B B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
p: f ==> g
fX: cod_disp_prebicat X
fY: cod_disp_prebicat Y
pf: fX -->[ f] fY
pg: fX -->[ g] fY
isaprop (pf ==>[ p] pg)

    apply B.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
disp_bicat (prod_bicat B B)

  
B: bicat
disp_bicat (prod_bicat B B)

    
B: bicat
disp_prebicat (prod_bicat B B)
B: bicat
(λ D : disp_prebicat (prod_bicat B B),
 has_disp_cellset D) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
disp_prebicat (prod_bicat B B)
 exact cod_disp_prebicat.
    
B: bicat
(λ D : disp_prebicat (prod_bicat B B),
 has_disp_cellset D) cod_disp_prebicat
 exact cod_has_disp_cellset.
  Defined.

  Definition cod_disp_bicat
    : disp_bicat B
    := sigma_bicat _ _ cod_disp_bicat_help.
End CodomainArrow.

(** Some projections and builders *)
Definition dom
           {B : bicat}
           {X : B}
           (f : cod_disp_bicat B X)
  : B
  := pr1 f.

Definition ar
           {B : bicat}
           {X : B}
           (f : cod_disp_bicat B X)
  : dom f --> X
  := pr2 f.

Definition make_ar
           {B : bicat}
           {X Y : B}
           (f : X --> Y)
  : cod_disp_bicat B Y
  := (X ,, f).

Definition make_disp_1cell_cod
           {B : bicat}
           {X Y : B}
           {f : X --> Y}
           {dX : cod_disp_bicat B X}
           {dY : cod_disp_bicat B Y}
           (h : dom dX --> dom dY)
           (p : invertible_2cell (pr2 dX · f) (h · pr2 dY))
  : dX -->[ f ] dY
  := h ,, p.

Definition coherent_homot
           {B : bicat}
           {X Y : B}
           {f g : X --> Y}
           (α : f ==> g)
           {dX : cod_disp_bicat B X}
           {dY : cod_disp_bicat B Y}
           {df : dX -->[ f ] dY}
           {dg : dX -->[ g ] dY}
           (h : pr1 df ==> pr1 dg)
  : UU
  := pr12 df • (h ▹ pr2 dY)
     =
     (pr2 dX ◃ α) • pr12 dg.

Definition make_disp_2cell_cod
           {B : bicat}
           {X Y : B}
           {f g : X --> Y}
           {α : f ==> g}
           {dX : cod_disp_bicat B X}
           {dY : cod_disp_bicat B Y}
           {df : dX -->[ f ] dY}
           {dg : dX -->[ g ] dY}
           (h : pr1 df ==> pr1 dg)
           (hh : coherent_homot α h)
  : df ==>[ α ] dg
  := h ,, hh.


B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα


B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα

  
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
gg ==>[ α ^-1] ff
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
(λ y : gg ==>[ α ^-1] ff,
 αα •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv α) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• αα =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv α) (disp_id2 gg)) ?pr1

  
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
gg ==>[ α ^-1] ff
 
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
pr1 gg ==>[ α ^-1] pr1 ff
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
(λ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ α ^-1] pr1 ff,
 let PPP := (g,, pr1 gg) ==> (f,, pr1 ff) in
 pr2 gg ==>[ α ^-1,, xx : PPP] pr2 ff) ?pr1

    
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
pr1 gg ==>[ α ^-1] pr1 ff
 exact Hαα^-1.
    
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
(λ xx : pr1 gg ==>[ α ^-1] pr1 ff,
 let PPP := (g,, pr1 gg) ==> (f,, pr1 ff) in
 pr2 gg ==>[ α ^-1,, xx : PPP] pr2 ff) Hαα ^-1
 abstract
        (simpl ;
         use vcomp_move_R_Mp ; is_iso ;
         simpl ;
         rewrite !vassocl ;
         use vcomp_move_L_pM ; is_iso ;
         simpl ;
         refine (!_) ;
         apply αα).
  
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
(λ y : gg ==>[ α ^-1] ff,
 αα •• y =
 transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
   (vcomp_rinv α) (disp_id2 ff)
 × y •• αα =
   transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
     (vcomp_linv α) (disp_id2 gg))
  (Hαα ^-1,,
   is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod_subproof B X Y f g α
     dX dY ff gg αα Hαα)
 
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
αα
•• (Hαα ^-1,,
    is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod_subproof B X Y f g α
      dX dY ff gg αα Hαα) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv α) (disp_id2 ff)
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
(Hαα ^-1,,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod_subproof B X Y f g α dX
   dY ff gg αα Hαα) •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv α) (disp_id2 gg)

    
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
αα
•• (Hαα ^-1,,
    is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod_subproof B X Y f g α
      dX dY ff gg αα Hαα) =
transportb (λ α : f ==> f, ff ==>[ α] ff)
  (vcomp_rinv α) (disp_id2 ff)
 abstract
        (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply B | ] ;
         simpl ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite pr1_transportf ;
         rewrite transportf_const ;
         unfold idfun ; cbn ;
         apply vcomp_rinv).
    
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)
(Hαα ^-1,,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod_subproof B X Y f g α dX
   dY ff gg αα Hαα) •• αα =
transportb (λ α : g ==> g, gg ==>[ α] gg)
  (vcomp_linv α) (disp_id2 gg)
 abstract
        (use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply B | ] ;
         simpl ;
         unfold transportb ;
         rewrite pr1_transportf ;
         rewrite transportf_const ;
         cbn ;
         apply vcomp_linv).
Defined.


B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
h₁: cod_disp_bicat B b₁
h₂: cod_disp_bicat B b₂
ff₁: h₁ -->[ f₁] h₂
ff₂: h₁ -->[ f₂] h₂
p: α = β
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
pr1
  (transportf (λ z : f₁ ==> f₂, ff₁ ==>[ z] ff₂) p αα) =
pr1 αα


B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
h₁: cod_disp_bicat B b₁
h₂: cod_disp_bicat B b₂
ff₁: h₁ -->[ f₁] h₂
ff₂: h₁ -->[ f₂] h₂
p: α = β
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
pr1
  (transportf (λ z : f₁ ==> f₂, ff₁ ==>[ z] ff₂) p αα) =
pr1 αα

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
h₁: cod_disp_bicat B b₁
h₂: cod_disp_bicat B b₂
ff₁: h₁ -->[ f₁] h₂
ff₂: h₁ -->[ f₂] h₂
p: α = β
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
pr1
  (transportf
     (λ z : f₁ ==> f₂,
      ∑ xx : pr1 ff₁ ==> pr1 ff₂,
      pr12 ff₁ • (xx ▹ pr2 h₂) =
      (pr2 h₁ ◃ z) • pr12 ff₂) p αα) = pr1 αα

  
B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
h₁: cod_disp_bicat B b₁
h₂: cod_disp_bicat B b₂
ff₁: h₁ -->[ f₁] h₂
ff₂: h₁ -->[ f₂] h₂
p: α = β
αα: ff₁ ==>[ α] ff₂
idfun (pr1 ff₁ ==> pr1 ff₂) (pr1 αα) = pr1 αα

  apply idpath.
Qed.


B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
h₁: cod_disp_bicat B b₁
h₂: cod_disp_bicat B b₂
ff₁: h₁ -->[ f₁] h₂
ff₂: h₁ -->[ f₂] h₂
p: α = β
ββ: ff₁ ==>[ β] ff₂
pr1
  (transportb (λ z : f₁ ==> f₂, ff₁ ==>[ z] ff₂) p ββ) =
pr1 ββ


B: bicat
b₁, b₂: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ b₁, b₂ ⟧
α, β: f₁ ==> f₂
h₁: cod_disp_bicat B b₁
h₂: cod_disp_bicat B b₂
ff₁: h₁ -->[ f₁] h₂
ff₂: h₁ -->[ f₂] h₂
p: α = β
ββ: ff₁ ==>[ β] ff₂
pr1
  (transportb (λ z : f₁ ==> f₂, ff₁ ==>[ z] ff₂) p ββ) =
pr1 ββ

  apply transportf_cell_of_cod_over.
Qed.


B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)


B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
is_invertible_2cell (pr1 αα)

  
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
pr1 gg ==> pr1 ff
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
pr1 αα • ?φ = id₂ (pr1 ff)
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
?φ • pr1 αα = id₂ (pr1 gg)

  
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
pr1 gg ==> pr1 ff
 exact (pr11 Hαα).
  
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
pr1 αα • pr11 Hαα = id₂ (pr1 ff)
 abstract
      (exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr12 Hαα) @ transportb_cell_of_cod_over _ _)).
  
B: bicat
X, Y: B
f, g: B ⟦ X, Y ⟧
α: invertible_2cell f g
dX: cod_disp_bicat B X
dY: cod_disp_bicat B Y
ff: dX -->[ f] dY
gg: dX -->[ g] dY
αα: ff ==>[ α] gg
Hαα: is_disp_invertible_2cell α αα
pr11 Hαα • pr1 αα = id₂ (pr1 gg)
 abstract
      (exact (maponpaths pr1 (pr22 Hαα) @ transportb_cell_of_cod_over _ _)).
Defined.


B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
disp_locally_groupoid (cod_disp_bicat B)


B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
disp_locally_groupoid (cod_disp_bicat B)

  
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: cod_disp_bicat B a
bb: cod_disp_bicat B b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_disp_invertible_2cell x xx

  
B: bicat
inv_B: locally_groupoid B
a, b: B
f, g: B ⟦ a, b ⟧
x: invertible_2cell f g
aa: cod_disp_bicat B a
bb: cod_disp_bicat B b
ff: aa -->[ f] bb
gg: aa -->[ g] bb
xx: ff ==>[ x] gg
is_invertible_2cell (pr1 xx)

  apply inv_B.
Defined.


disp_locally_groupoid (cod_disp_bicat one_types)


disp_locally_groupoid (cod_disp_bicat one_types)

  
locally_groupoid one_types

  exact @one_type_2cell_iso.
Defined.

(**
 2. The univalence
*)
Section UnivalenceOfCodomain.
  Context (B : bicat).

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
ψ₁ ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] ψ₂
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
(λ x : ψ₁ ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] ψ₂,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) x)
  ?pr1

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
ψ₁ ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] ψ₂
 
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
pr1 ψ₁ ==> pr1 ψ₂
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) ?h

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
pr1 ψ₁ ==> pr1 ψ₂
 exact (pr1 α).
      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
 exact Hα.
    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
(λ x : ψ₁ ==>[ id2_invertible_2cell f] ψ₂,
 is_disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) x)
  (make_disp_2cell_cod (pr1 α) Hα)
 
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂)
Hα: coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
is_invertible_2cell
  (pr1 (make_disp_2cell_cod (pr1 α) Hα))

      exact (pr2 α).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
(∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
 coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α))
→ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
(∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
 coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α))
→ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: ∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂

    exact (cod_invertible_2_cell_to_disp_invertible_help _ (pr2 α)).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂
→ ∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
  coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂
→ ∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
  coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)

φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)

α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
pr1 ψ₁ ==> pr1 ψ₂

c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
(λ η : pr1 ψ₁ ==> pr1 ψ₂, is_invertible_2cell η) ?pr1

α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
(λ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
 coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α))
  (?pr1,, ?pr2)

c₁, c₂: B

α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
pr1 ψ₁ ==> pr1 ψ₂
 exact (pr11 α).

f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
(λ η : pr1 ψ₁ ==> pr1 ψ₂, is_invertible_2cell η)
  (pr11 α)

α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
is_invertible_2cell (pr11 α)

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
pr1 ψ₂ ==> pr1 ψ₁
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
pr11 α • ?φ = id₂ (pr1 ψ₁)
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
?φ • pr11 α = id₂ (pr1 ψ₂)

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
pr1 ψ₂ ==> pr1 ψ₁
 exact (pr1 (disp_inv_cell α)).
      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
pr11 α • pr1 (disp_inv_cell α) = id₂ (pr1 ψ₁)
 abstract
          (assert (p := maponpaths pr1 (disp_vcomp_rinv α));
           cbn in p ;
           (etrans; [exact p |]) ;
           clear p ;
           unfold transportb ;
           (etrans ;
            [exact (pr1_transportf (! id2_left (id₂ f)) (id₂ (pr1 ψ₁),, disp_id2 (pr2 ψ₁))) |]) ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite transportf_const ;
           apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
pr1 (disp_inv_cell α) • pr11 α = id₂ (pr1 ψ₂)
 abstract
          (assert (p := maponpaths pr1 (disp_vcomp_linv α));
           cbn in p ;
           (etrans; [exact p |]) ;
           clear p ;
           unfold transportb ;
           (etrans ;
            [exact (pr1_transportf (! id2_left (id₂ f)) (id₂ (pr1 ψ₂),, disp_id2 (pr2 ψ₂))) |]) ;
           cbn ;
           rewrite transportf_const ;
           apply idpath).
    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
α: disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
  ψ₂
(λ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
 coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α))
  (pr11 α,,
   (make_is_invertible_2cell
      (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell_subproof
         c₁ c₂ f φ₁ φ₂ ψ₁ ψ₂ α)
      (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell_subproof0
         c₁ c₂ f φ₁ φ₂ ψ₁ ψ₂ α)
    :
    (λ η : pr1 ψ₁ ==> pr1 ψ₂, is_invertible_2cell η)
      (pr11 α)))
 exact (pr21 α).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
(∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
 coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α))
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂

φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂

(∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
 coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α))
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂

f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧

φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
(∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
 coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α))
→ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
isweq ?f

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
(∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
 coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α))
→ disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂
 exact cod_invertible_2_cell_to_disp_invertible.
    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
isweq cod_invertible_2_cell_to_disp_invertible
 
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂
→ ∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
  coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
∏
x : ∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
    coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α),
?g (cod_invertible_2_cell_to_disp_invertible x) = x
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
∏
y : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
      ψ₂,
cod_invertible_2_cell_to_disp_invertible (?g y) = y

      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁ ψ₂
→ ∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
  coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α)
 exact cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell.
      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
∏
x : ∑ α : invertible_2cell (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂),
    coherent_homot (id2_invertible_2cell f) (pr1 α),
cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell
  (cod_invertible_2_cell_to_disp_invertible x) = x
 abstract
          (intro α ;
           use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply B | ] ;
           use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell | ] ;
           apply idpath).
      
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
∏
y : disp_invertible_2cell (id2_invertible_2cell f) ψ₁
      ψ₂,
cod_invertible_2_cell_to_disp_invertible
  (cod_disp_invertible_invertible_2_cell y) = y
 abstract
          (intro α ;
           use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell | ] ;
           use subtypePath ; [ intro ; apply B | ] ;
           apply idpath).
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
p: pr1 ψ₁ = pr1 ψ₂
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ pr2 (c₁,, pr1 φ₁), pr2 (c₂,, pr1 φ₂) ⟧,
   invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (x · pr2 φ₂)) p
  (pr2 ψ₁) = pr2 ψ₂
≃ coherent_homot (id₂ f)
    (pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂) p))

  
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
p: pr1 ψ₁ = pr1 ψ₂
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ pr2 (c₁,, pr1 φ₁), pr2 (c₂,, pr1 φ₂) ⟧,
   invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (x · pr2 φ₂)) p
  (pr2 ψ₁) = pr2 ψ₂
≃ coherent_homot (id₂ f)
    (pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 ψ₁) (pr1 ψ₂) p))

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: pr1 φ₁ -->[ f] pr1 φ₂
q₁: pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, ψ₁] pr2 φ₂
ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
p: pr1 (ψ₁,, q₁) = pr1 ψ₂
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ pr2 (c₁,, pr1 φ₁), pr2 (c₂,, pr1 φ₂) ⟧,
   invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (x · pr2 φ₂)) p
  (pr2 (ψ₁,, q₁)) = pr2 ψ₂
≃ coherent_homot (id₂ f)
    (pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (ψ₁,, q₁)) (pr1 ψ₂) p))

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: pr1 φ₁ -->[ f] pr1 φ₂
q₁: pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, ψ₁] pr2 φ₂
ψ₂: pr1 φ₁ -->[ f] pr1 φ₂
q₂: pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, ψ₂] pr2 φ₂
p: pr1 (ψ₁,, q₁) = pr1 (ψ₂,, q₂)
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ pr2 (c₁,, pr1 φ₁), pr2 (c₂,, pr1 φ₂) ⟧,
   invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (x · pr2 φ₂)) p
  (pr2 (ψ₁,, q₁)) = pr2 (ψ₂,, q₂)
≃ coherent_homot (id₂ f)
    (pr1
       (idtoiso_2_1 (pr1 (ψ₁,, q₁)) (pr1 (ψ₂,, q₂)) p))

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
ψ₂: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₂ · pr2 φ₂)
p: ψ₁ = ψ₂
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧,
   invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (x · pr2 φ₂)) p q₁ =
q₂
≃ coherent_homot (id₂ f) (pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 ψ₁ ψ₂ p))

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧,
   invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (x · pr2 φ₂))
  (idpath ψ₁) q₁ = q₂
≃ coherent_homot (id₂ f)
    (pr1 (idtoiso_2_1 ψ₁ ψ₁ (idpath ψ₁)))

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
q₁ = q₂ ≃ coherent_homot (id₂ f) (id₂ ψ₁)

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
q₁ = q₂
≃ pr12 (ψ₁,, q₁) • (id₂ ψ₁ ▹ pr2 φ₂) =
  (pr2 φ₁ ◃ id₂ f) • pr12 (ψ₁,, q₂)

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
q₁ = q₂
≃ pr1 q₁ • (id₂ ψ₁ ▹ pr2 φ₂) =
  (pr2 φ₁ ◃ id₂ f) • pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
q₁ = q₂
≃ pr1 q₁ • id₂ (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂) =
  (pr2 φ₁ ◃ id₂ f) • pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
q₁ = q₂ ≃ pr1 q₁ = (pr2 φ₁ ◃ id₂ f) • pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
q₁ = q₂ ≃ pr1 q₁ = id₂ (pr2 φ₁ · f) • pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
q₁ = q₂ ≃ pr1 q₁ = pr1 q₂

    
B: bicat
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₁ ⟧
φ₂: ∑ d : B, B ⟦ d, c₂ ⟧
ψ₁: B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧
q₁, q₂: invertible_2cell (pr2 φ₁ · f) (ψ₁ · pr2 φ₂)
isaprop (is_invertible_2cell (pr1 q₂))

    apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B)

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
disp_univalent_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
fiberwise_local_univalent (cod_disp_bicat B)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
isweq
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath f) ψ₁
     ψ₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
  (idpath f) ψ₁ = ψ₂
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
    ψ₁ ψ₂
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
?w ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath f) ψ₁ ψ₂

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
  (idpath f) ψ₁ = ψ₂
≃ disp_invertible_2cell (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f))
    ψ₁ ψ₂
 exact (cod_invertible_2_cell_weq_disp_invertible
             ∘ weqtotal2 (make_weq _ (HB_2_1 _ _ _ _)) cod_2cell_path
             ∘ total2_paths_equiv _ _ _)%weq.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
(cod_invertible_2_cell_weq_disp_invertible
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq
        (idtoiso_2_1
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                 (idpath f) ψ₁)) (pr1 ψ₂))
        (HB_2_1 (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                 (idpath f) ψ₁)) (pr1 ψ₂)))
     cod_2cell_path
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ x : B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧,
      pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, x] pr2 φ₂)
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
        (idpath f) ψ₁) ψ₂)%weq ~
disp_idtoiso_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath f) ψ₁ ψ₂
 
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁, ψ₂: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
p: transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
  (idpath f) ψ₁ = ψ₂
(cod_invertible_2_cell_weq_disp_invertible
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq
        (idtoiso_2_1
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                 (idpath f) ψ₁)) (pr1 ψ₂))
        (HB_2_1 (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                 (idpath f) ψ₁)) (pr1 ψ₂)))
     cod_2cell_path
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ x : B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧,
      pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, x] pr2 φ₂)
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
        (idpath f) ψ₁) ψ₂)%weq p =
disp_idtoiso_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath f) ψ₁ ψ₂ p

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
(cod_invertible_2_cell_weq_disp_invertible
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq
        (idtoiso_2_1
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                 (idpath f) ψ₁))
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                 (idpath f) ψ₁)))
        (HB_2_1 (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                 (idpath f) ψ₁))
           (pr1
              (transportf
                 (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                 (idpath f) ψ₁)))) cod_2cell_path
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ x : B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧,
      pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, x] pr2 φ₂)
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
        (idpath f) ψ₁)
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
        (idpath f) ψ₁))%weq
  (idpath
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
        (idpath f) ψ₁)) =
disp_idtoiso_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath f) ψ₁
  (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
     (idpath f) ψ₁)
  (idpath
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
        (idpath f) ψ₁))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)))
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
pr1
  ((cod_invertible_2_cell_weq_disp_invertible
    ∘ weqtotal2
        (make_weq
           (idtoiso_2_1
              (pr1
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                    (idpath f) ψ₁))
              (pr1
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                    (idpath f) ψ₁)))
           (HB_2_1 (pr1 φ₁) 
              (pr1 φ₂)
              (pr1
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                    (idpath f) ψ₁))
              (pr1
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                    (idpath f) ψ₁)))) cod_2cell_path
    ∘ total2_paths_equiv
        (λ x : B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧,
         pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, x] pr2 φ₂)
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁)
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁))%weq
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁))) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (idpath f) ψ₁
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
        (idpath f) ψ₁)
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
isPredicate
  (is_disp_invertible_2cell
     (idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)))

        intro ; apply isaprop_is_disp_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
pr1
  ((cod_invertible_2_cell_weq_disp_invertible
    ∘ weqtotal2
        (make_weq
           (idtoiso_2_1
              (pr1
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                    (idpath f) ψ₁))
              (pr1
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                    (idpath f) ψ₁)))
           (HB_2_1 (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
              (pr1
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                    (idpath f) ψ₁))
              (pr1
                 (transportf
                    (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
                    (idpath f) ψ₁)))) cod_2cell_path
    ∘ total2_paths_equiv
        (λ x : B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧,
         pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, x] pr2 φ₂)
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁)
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁))%weq
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁))) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath f) ψ₁
     (transportf (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
        (idpath f) ψ₁)
     (idpath
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 ψ₁ ==>[
         idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)] pr1
                                       (transportf
                                          (λ z : B
                                                 ⟦ c₁,
                                                 c₂ ⟧,
                                           φ₁ -->[
                                           z] φ₂)
                                          (idpath f)
                                          ψ₁),
   let PPP :=
     (f,, pr1 ψ₁) ==>
     (f,,
      pr1
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁)) in
   pr2 ψ₁ ==>[
   idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f),, x : PPP] pr2
                                           (transportf
                                              (λ z : 
                                                 B
                                                 ⟦ c₁,
                                                 c₂ ⟧,
                                               φ₁ -->[
                                               z] φ₂)
                                              (idpath
                                                 f) ψ₁))
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
pr11 ((cod_invertible_2_cell_weq_disp_invertible
       ∘ weqtotal2
           (make_weq
              (idtoiso_2_1
                 (pr1
                    (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, 
                       φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂) 
                       (idpath f) ψ₁))
                 (pr1
                    (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, 
                       φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂) 
                       (idpath f) ψ₁)))
              (HB_2_1 (pr1 φ₁) 
                 (pr1 φ₂)
                 (pr1
                    (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, 
                       φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂) 
                       (idpath f) ψ₁))
                 (pr1
                    (transportf
                       (λ 
                       z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, 
                       φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂) 
                       (idpath f) ψ₁))))
           cod_2cell_path
       ∘ total2_paths_equiv
           (λ x : B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧,
            pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, x] pr2 φ₂)
           (transportf
              (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
              (idpath f) ψ₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
              (idpath f) ψ₁))%weq
        (idpath
           (transportf
              (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
              (idpath f) ψ₁))) =
pr11 (disp_idtoiso_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B) 
        (idpath f) ψ₁
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁)
        (idpath
           (transportf
              (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
              (idpath f) ψ₁)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
isPredicate
  (λ x : pr1 ψ₁ ==>[
         idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f)] pr1
                                       (transportf
                                          (λ z : B
                                                 ⟦ c₁,
                                                 c₂ ⟧,
                                           φ₁ -->[
                                           z] φ₂)
                                          (idpath f)
                                          ψ₁),
   let PPP :=
     (f,, pr1 ψ₁) ==>
     (f,,
      pr1
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁)) in
   pr2 ψ₁ ==>[
   idtoiso_2_1 f f (idpath f),, x : PPP] pr2
                                           (transportf
                                              (λ z : 
                                                 B
                                                 ⟦ c₁,
                                                 c₂ ⟧,
                                               φ₁ -->[
                                               z] φ₂)
                                              (idpath
                                                 f) ψ₁))

        intro ; apply B.
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c₁, c₂: B
f: B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧
φ₁: cod_disp_bicat B c₁
φ₂: cod_disp_bicat B c₂
ψ₁: φ₁ -->[ f] φ₂
pr11 ((cod_invertible_2_cell_weq_disp_invertible
       ∘ weqtotal2
           (make_weq
              (idtoiso_2_1
                 (pr1
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧,
                        φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂) (idpath f) ψ₁))
                 (pr1
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧,
                        φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂) (idpath f) ψ₁)))
              (HB_2_1 (pr1 φ₁) (pr1 φ₂)
                 (pr1
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧,
                        φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂) (idpath f) ψ₁))
                 (pr1
                    (transportf
                       (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧,
                        φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂) (idpath f) ψ₁))))
           cod_2cell_path
       ∘ total2_paths_equiv
           (λ x : B ⟦ pr1 φ₁, pr1 φ₂ ⟧,
            pr2 φ₁ -->[ f,, x] pr2 φ₂)
           (transportf
              (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
              (idpath f) ψ₁)
           (transportf
              (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
              (idpath f) ψ₁))%weq
        (idpath
           (transportf
              (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
              (idpath f) ψ₁))) =
pr11 (disp_idtoiso_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath f)
        ψ₁
        (transportf
           (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
           (idpath f) ψ₁)
        (idpath
           (transportf
              (λ z : B ⟦ c₁, c₂ ⟧, φ₁ -->[ z] φ₂)
              (idpath f) ψ₁)))

      apply idpath.
  Defined.

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
p: pr1 f₁ = pr1 f₂
transportf (λ b : B, B ⟦ b, c ⟧) p (pr2 f₁) = pr2 f₂
≃ invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁)
    (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) p · pr2 f₂)

  
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
p: pr1 f₁ = pr1 f₂
transportf (λ b : B, B ⟦ b, c ⟧) p (pr2 f₁) = pr2 f₂
≃ invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁)
    (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂) p · pr2 f₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
c₁: trivial_displayed_bicat B B c
f₁: cod_disp_bicat_help B (c,, c₁)
f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
p: pr1 (c₁,, f₁) = pr1 f₂
transportf (λ b : B, B ⟦ b, c ⟧) p (pr2 (c₁,, f₁)) =
pr2 f₂
≃ invertible_2cell (pr2 (c₁,, f₁))
    (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (c₁,, f₁)) (pr1 f₂) p · pr2 f₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
c₁: trivial_displayed_bicat B B c
f₁: cod_disp_bicat_help B (c,, c₁)
c₂: trivial_displayed_bicat B B c
f₂: cod_disp_bicat_help B (c,, c₂)
p: pr1 (c₁,, f₁) = pr1 (c₂,, f₂)
transportf (λ b : B, B ⟦ b, c ⟧) p (pr2 (c₁,, f₁)) =
pr2 (c₂,, f₂)
≃ invertible_2cell (pr2 (c₁,, f₁))
    (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 (c₁,, f₁)) (pr1 (c₂,, f₂)) p
     · pr2 (c₂,, f₂))

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c, c₁: B
f₁: B ⟦ c₁, c ⟧
c₂: B
f₂: B ⟦ c₂, c ⟧
p: c₁ = c₂
transportf (λ b : B, B ⟦ b, c ⟧) p f₁ = f₂
≃ invertible_2cell f₁ (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 c₁ c₂ p) · f₂)

    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c, c₁: B
f₁, f₂: B ⟦ c₁, c ⟧
transportf (λ b : B, B ⟦ b, c ⟧) (idpath c₁) f₁ = f₂
≃ invertible_2cell f₁
    (pr1 (idtoiso_2_0 c₁ c₁ (idpath c₁)) · f₂)

    exact (cod_1cell_path_help f₁ f₂ ∘ make_weq _ (HB_2_1 _ _ _ _))%weq.
  Defined.

  Section AdjEquivToDispAdjEquiv.
    Context {c : B}
            {f₁ f₂ : cod_disp_bicat B c}
            (e : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂))
            (α : invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)).

    Let l : pr1 f₁ --> pr1 f₂ := pr1 e.
    Let r : pr1 f₂ --> pr1 f₁ := left_adjoint_right_adjoint e.
    Let η : invertible_2cell (id₁ _) (l · r) := left_equivalence_unit_iso e.
    Let ε : invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ _) := left_equivalence_counit_iso e.

    
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
f₁ -->[ internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c] f₂

c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
