B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
pr2 f₂ · id₁ c ==> r · pr2 f₁
 refine (runitor _
                  • linvunitor _
                  • (ε^-1 ▹ _)
                  • rassociator _ _ _
                  • (_ ◃ α^-1)).
        
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
is_invertible_2cell
  ((((runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂))
     • (ε ^-1 ▹ pr2 f₂)) • rassociator r l (pr2 f₂))
   • (r ◃ α ^-1))
 is_iso.
    Defined.

    Definition cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_unit
      : pr1 (id_disp f₁)
        ==>
        pr1 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_map
        ;;
        cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_right_adj)
      := η.

    
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
coherent_homot
  (left_adjoint_unit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c))
  cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_unit

    
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
(runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁))
• (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 e) ▹ pr2 f₁) =
(pr2 f₁ ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c))
• ((((lassociator (pr2 f₁) (id₁ c) (id₁ c)
      • ((runitor (pr2 f₁) • α) ▹ id₁ c))
     • rassociator l (pr2 f₂) (id₁ c))
    • (l
       ◃ ((((runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂))
            • ((pr222 e) ^-1 ▹ pr2 f₂))
           • rassociator r l (pr2 f₂)) • (r ◃ α ^-1))))
   • lassociator l r (pr2 f₁))

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
(runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁))
• (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 e) ▹ pr2 f₁) =
(((((pr2 f₁ ◃ linvunitor (id₁ c))
    • lassociator (pr2 f₁) (id₁ c) (id₁ c))
   • ((runitor (pr2 f₁) • α) ▹ id₁ c))

 • (l
    ◃ ((((runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂))

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
rinvunitor (pr2 f₁) ▹ id₁ c = ?y'

        apply idpath.
      
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
((((rinvunitor (pr2 f₁) ▹ id₁ c)
   • ((runitor (pr2 f₁) • α) ▹ id₁ c))
  • rassociator l (pr2 f₂) (id₁ c))
 • (l
    ◃ ((((runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂))
         • ((pr222 e) ^-1 ▹ pr2 f₂))
        • rassociator r l (pr2 f₂)) • (r ◃ α ^-1))))
• lassociator l r (pr2 f₁) =
(runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁))
• (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 e) ▹ pr2 f₁)

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))

   ▹ id₁ c) • rassociator l (pr2 f₂) (id₁ c))

(runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁))
• (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 e) ▹ pr2 f₁)

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
?b0 = ?b

r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))

(is_invertible_2cell_lwhisker l

            (is_invertible_2cell_inv (pr222 e)))
         (is_invertible_2cell_rassociator r l (pr2 f₂)))))
^-1
• (linvunitor (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
   • (left_adjoint_unit (pr1 e) ▹ pr1 e · pr2 f₂))

((l
  ◃ (lassociator r l (pr2 f₂)
     • ((left_adjoint_counit (pr1 e) ▹ pr2 f₂)
        • lunitor (pr2 f₂))))
 • (((rinvunitor (pr1 e)
      • (pr1 e ◃ (pr222 (pr2 e)) ^-1))
     • lassociator (pr1 e) (pr112 e) (pr1 e)) ▹ pr2 f₂))
• rassociator (l · r) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) =
lassociator l r (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)

      
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
is_invertible_2cell
  (rassociator (l · r) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂))

      • ((pr1 e ◃ (pr222 (pr2 e)) ^-1) ▹ pr2 f₂))) =
?t2

r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))

  • (l ◃ lunitor (pr2 f₂)))

    Definition cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_counit
      : pr1 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_right_adj

c: B

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
coherent_homot
  (left_adjoint_counit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c))
  cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_counit

e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
?b = runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂)

      
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
((linvunitor (pr2 f₂)
  • (((pr222 e) ^-1 ▹ pr2 f₂)
     • rassociator r l (pr2 f₂))) ▹ id₁ c)
• (((r ◃ α ^-1) ▹ id₁ c)
   • (rassociator r (pr2 f₁) (id₁ c)
      • ((r ◃ (runitor (pr2 f₁) • α))
         • (lassociator r l (pr2 f₂)
            • (pr221 (pr2 e) ▹ pr2 f₂))))) = ?b

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
((r ◃ α ^-1) ▹ id₁ c)
• (rassociator r (pr2 f₁) (id₁ c)
   • ((r ◃ (runitor (pr2 f₁) • α))
      • (lassociator r l (pr2 f₂)
         • (pr221 (pr2 e) ▹ pr2 f₂)))) = ?t2

     • rassociator r l (pr2 f₂))) ▹ id₁ c)

runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂)

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
(((rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
  • rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂) (id₁ c))
 • (pr112 e ◃ runitor (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)))
• lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) =
runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr2 f₂)

c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
p: (((rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
  • rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂) (id₁ c))
 • (pr112 e ◃ runitor (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)))
• lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) =
runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
(linvunitor (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
• (((((pr222 e) ^-1 ▹ pr2 f₂)
     • rassociator r l (pr2 f₂)) ▹ id₁ c)
   • (rassociator r (pr1 e · pr2 f₂) (id₁ c)
      • ((r ◃ runitor (pr1 e · pr2 f₂))
         • (lassociator r l (pr2 f₂)
            • (pr221 (pr2 e) ▹ pr2 f₂))))) =
runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂)

c: B

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
(rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
• (rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂) (id₁ c)

c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
(rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
• (rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂) (id₁ c)
   • ((lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
         (id₁ (pr1 (c,, pr1 f₂)))
       • runitor (pr112 e · (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)))

runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr2 f₂)

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
?b = runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr2 f₂)

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
(rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)

   • (lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
        (id₁ (pr1 (c,, pr1 f₂)))

?b

c: B

• lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) =
runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
(linvunitor (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
• (((((pr222 e) ^-1 ▹ pr2 f₂)
     • rassociator r l (pr2 f₂)) ▹ id₁ c)

      • ((r ◃ runitor (pr1 e · pr2 f₂))
         • (lassociator r l (pr2 f₂)
            • (pr221 (pr2 e) ▹ pr2 f₂))))) =
runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂)

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)

r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))

  • rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂) (id₁ c))
 • (pr112 e ◃ runitor (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)))
• lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) =
runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
(linvunitor (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
• ((((pr222 e) ^-1 ▹ pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
   • (runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
      • (pr221 (pr2 e) ▹ pr2 f₂))) =
runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂)

      
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
p: (((rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
  • rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂) (id₁ c))
 • (pr112 e ◃ runitor (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)))
• lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) =
runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
(linvunitor (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
• ((((pr222 e) ^-1 ▹ pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
   • (((pr221 (pr2 e) ▹ pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
      • runitor (id₁ (pr1 f₂) · pr2 f₂))) =
runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂)

      • runitor (id₁ (pr1 f₂) · pr2 f₂))) = ?b

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))

• (id₂ (id₁ (pr1 f₂) · pr2 f₂ · id₁ c)

c: B

 • (pr112 e ◃ runitor (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)))
• lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) =

(linvunitor (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
• runitor (id₁ (pr1 f₂) · pr2 f₂) =

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
p: (((rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) ▹ id₁ c)
  • rassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂) (id₁ c))
 • (pr112 e ◃ runitor (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)))
• lassociator (pr112 e) (pr1 e) (pr2 f₂) =
runitor (pr112 e · pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂) =
runitor (pr2 f₂) • linvunitor (pr2 f₂)

      apply idpath.
    Qed.

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c)
  cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_map

ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
(λ _ : disp_left_adjoint_axioms
         (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c)
         ?pr1,

   (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) ?pr1)

left_adjoint_unit

?pr10

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)
α: invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 e · pr2 f₂)
l:= pr1 e: B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧
r:= left_adjoint_right_adjoint e: B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
η:= left_equivalence_unit_iso e: invertible_2cell (id₁ (pr1 f₁)) (l · r)
ε:= left_equivalence_counit_iso e: invertible_2cell (r · l) (id₁ (pr1 f₂))
is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_unit_iso
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c))
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c)
     (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_right_adj,,
      make_disp_2cell_cod
        cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_unit
        cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_unit_homot,,
      make_disp_2cell_cod
        cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_counit
        cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_counit_homot))

is_disp_invertible_2cell
  (left_equivalence_counit_iso
     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c))

     (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c)

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧

c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
id₁ (pr1 f₁) ==> pr11 e · ?pr10

c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
(λ _ : id₁ (pr1 f₁) ==> pr11 e · ?pr10,
 ?pr10 · pr11 e ==> id₁ (pr1 f₂)) ?pr11

c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
B ⟦ pr1 f₂, pr1 f₁ ⟧
 exact (pr1 (pr112 e)).

c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
id₁ (pr1 f₁) ==> pr11 e · pr111 (pr2 e)
 exact (pr11 (pr212 e)).

c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
(λ _ : id₁ (pr1 f₁) ==> pr11 e · pr111 (pr2 e),
 pr111 (pr2 e) · pr11 e ==> id₁ (pr1 f₂))
  (pr112 (pr12 e))
 exact (pr12 (pr212 e)).

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
(((linvunitor (pr11 e)
   • (left_adjoint_unit
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)) ▹ pr11 e))
  • rassociator (pr11 e)
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (pr111 (pr2 e),,
          pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))) (pr11 e))
 • (pr11 e
    ◃ left_adjoint_counit
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))))
• runitor (pr11 e) = id₂ (pr11 e)
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
(((rinvunitor
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)))
   • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))
      ◃ left_adjoint_unit
          (pr111 (pr2 e),,
           pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))))
  • lassociator
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (pr111 (pr2 e),,
          pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))) (pr11 e)
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (pr111 (pr2 e),,
          pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))))
 • (left_adjoint_counit
      (pr111 (pr2 e),, pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))
    ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))))
• lunitor
    (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
       (pr111 (pr2 e),,
        pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))) =
id₂
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (pr111 (pr2 e),, pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)))

          
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
(((linvunitor (pr11 e)
   • (left_adjoint_unit
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)) ▹ pr11 e))
  • rassociator (pr11 e)
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (pr111 (pr2 e),,
          pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))) (pr11 e))
 • (pr11 e
    ◃ left_adjoint_counit
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))))
• runitor (pr11 e) = id₂ (pr11 e)
 abstract
               (refine (maponpaths pr1 (pr1 (pr122 e)) @ _) ;
                unfold transportb ;
                cbn ;
                refine (@pr1_transportf _ (λ _, _) _ _ _ _ _ @ _) ;
                rewrite transportf_const ;
                apply idpath).
          
B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
(((rinvunitor
     (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)))
   • (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))
      ◃ left_adjoint_unit
          (pr111 (pr2 e),,
           pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))))
  • lassociator
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (pr111 (pr2 e),,
          pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))) (pr11 e)
      (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
         (pr111 (pr2 e),,
          pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))))
 • (left_adjoint_counit
      (pr111 (pr2 e),, pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))
    ▹ left_adjoint_right_adjoint
        (pr111 (pr2 e),,
         pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))))
• lunitor
    (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
       (pr111 (pr2 e),,
        pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e))) =
id₂
  (left_adjoint_right_adjoint
     (pr111 (pr2 e),, pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)))
 abstract
               (refine (maponpaths pr1 (pr2 (pr122 e)) @ _) ;
                unfold transportb ;
                cbn ;
                refine (@pr1_transportf _ (λ _, _) _ _ _ _ _ @ _) ;
                rewrite transportf_const ;
                apply idpath).

c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
(λ _ : left_adjoint_axioms
         (pr111 (pr2 e),,
          pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)),
 left_equivalence_axioms
   (pr111 (pr2 e),, pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)))
  (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof c f₁ f₂ e,,
   cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof0 c f₁ f₂ e)

B: bicat
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: disp_adjoint_equivalence
  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
(λ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
 invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 y · pr2 f₂))
  (pr11 e,,
   ((pr111 (pr2 e),, pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)),,
    (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof c f₁ f₂
       e,,
     cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof0 c f₁ f₂
       e),,
    from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
      (disp_left_adjoint_unit
         (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c)
         (pr12 e)) (pr122 (pr2 e)),,
    from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
      (disp_left_adjoint_counit
         (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c)
         (pr12 e)) (pr222 (pr2 e))
    :
    (λ f : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
     left_adjoint_equivalence f) (pr11 e)))

  Defined.

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: ∑ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 y · pr2 f₂)
cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv
  (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e) = e

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: ∑ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 y · pr2 f₂)
pr11 e,,
(pr111 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
          (pr1 e) (pr2 e)),,
 pr112 (pr1
          (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
             (pr1 e) (pr2 e))),,
 pr122 (pr1
          (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
             (pr1 e) (pr2 e)))),,
(cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof c f₁ f₂
   (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e),,
 cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof0 c f₁ f₂
   (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e)),,
from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
  (disp_left_adjoint_unit
     (internal_adjunction_data_identity c)
     (pr1
        (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
           (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
  (pr122 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
            (pr1 e) (pr2 e))),,
from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
  (disp_left_adjoint_counit
     (internal_adjunction_data_identity c)
     (pr1
        (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
           (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
  (pr222 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
            (pr1 e) (pr2 e))) = pr1 e

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: ∑ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),

pr1
  (pr11 e,,
   (pr111 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
             (pr1 e) (pr2 e)),,
    pr112 (pr1
             (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj

                (pr2 e))),,

                (pr1 e) 
                (pr2 e)))),,
   (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof c f₁ f₂
      (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e),,
    cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof0 c f₁ f₂
      (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e)),,

     (disp_left_adjoint_unit
        (internal_adjunction_data_identity c)
        (pr1

              (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
     (pr122 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
               (pr1 e) (pr2 e))),,
   from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
     (disp_left_adjoint_counit
        (internal_adjunction_data_identity c)
        (pr1
           (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
              (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
     (pr222 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
               (pr1 e) (pr2 e)))) = pr11 e

B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: ∑ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 y · pr2 f₂)
pr1
  (pr11 e,,
   (pr111 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
             (pr1 e) (pr2 e)),,
    pr112 (pr1
             (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                (pr1 e) (pr2 e))),,
    pr122 (pr1
             (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                (pr1 e) (pr2 e)))),,
   (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof c f₁ f₂
      (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e),,
    cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof0 c f₁ f₂
      (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e)),,
   from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
     (disp_left_adjoint_unit
        (internal_adjunction_data_identity c)
        (pr1
           (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
              (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
     (pr122 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
               (pr1 e) (pr2 e))),,
   from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
     (disp_left_adjoint_counit
        (internal_adjunction_data_identity c)
        (pr1
           (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
              (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
     (pr222 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
               (pr1 e) (pr2 e)))) = pr11 e

      apply idpath.
    
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: ∑ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 y · pr2 f₂)
transportf
  (λ x : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
   invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 x · pr2 f₂))
  (subtypePath
     ((λ x : B ⟦ pr1 f₁, pr1 f₂ ⟧,
       isaprop_left_adjoint_equivalence x HB_2_1)
      :
      isPredicate left_adjoint_equivalence)
     (idpath (pr11 e))
   :
   pr1
     (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv
        (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e)) = pr1 e)
  (pr2
     (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv
        (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e))) = pr2 e
 
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: ∑ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 y · pr2 f₂)
transportf
  (λ x : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
   invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 x · pr2 f₂))
  (total2_paths_f (idpath (pr11 e))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_left_adjoint_equivalence (pr11 e)
           HB_2_1
           (transportf left_adjoint_equivalence
              (idpath (pr11 e))
              (pr2
                 (pr11 e,,
                  (pr111 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                            (pr1 e) (pr2 e)),,
                   pr112 (pr1
                            (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                               (pr1 e) (pr2 e))),,
                   pr122 (pr1
                            (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                               (pr1 e) (pr2 e)))),,
                  (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof
                     c f₁ f₂
                     (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv
                        e),,
                   cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof0
                     c f₁ f₂
                     (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv
                        e)),,
                  from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
                    (disp_left_adjoint_unit
                       (internal_adjunction_data_identity
                          c)
                       (pr1
                          (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                             (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
                    (pr122 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                              (pr1 e) (pr2 e))),,
                  from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
                    (disp_left_adjoint_counit
                       (internal_adjunction_data_identity
                          c)
                       (pr1
                          (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                             (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
                    (pr222 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                              (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))))
           (pr21 e))))
  (pr2
     (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv
        (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e))) = pr2 e

HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B

                             (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
                    (pr222 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                              (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))))
           (pr21 e))))
  (pr2
     (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv
        (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e))) = ?b
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: ∑ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 y · pr2 f₂)
?b = pr2 e

      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: ∑ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 y · pr2 f₂)
transportf
  (λ x : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
   invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 x · pr2 f₂))
  (total2_paths_f (idpath (pr11 e))
     (pr1
        (isaprop_left_adjoint_equivalence (pr11 e)
           HB_2_1
           (transportf left_adjoint_equivalence
              (idpath (pr11 e))
              (pr2
                 (pr11 e,,
                  (pr111 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                            (pr1 e) (pr2 e)),,
                   pr112 (pr1
                            (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                               (pr1 e) (pr2 e))),,
                   pr122 (pr1
                            (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                               (pr1 e) (pr2 e)))),,
                  (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof
                     c f₁ f₂
                     (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv
                        e),,
                   cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof0
                     c f₁ f₂
                     (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv
                        e)),,
                  from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
                    (disp_left_adjoint_unit
                       (internal_adjunction_data_identity
                          c)
                       (pr1
                          (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                             (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
                    (pr122 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                              (pr1 e) (pr2 e))),,
                  from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod
                    (disp_left_adjoint_counit
                       (internal_adjunction_data_identity
                          c)
                       (pr1
                          (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                             (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))
                    (pr222 (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv_disp_adj
                              (pr1 e) (pr2 e))))))
           (pr21 e))))
  (pr2
     (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv
        (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e))) = ?b

        apply (transportf_total2_paths_f (λ x, invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (x · pr2 f₂))).
      
B: bicat
HB_2_1: is_univalent_2_1 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
e: ∑ y : adjoint_equivalence (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂),
invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (pr1 y · pr2 f₂)
transportf
  (λ x : B ⟦ pr2 (c,, pr1 f₁), pr2 (c,, pr1 f₂) ⟧,
   invertible_2cell (pr2 f₁) (x · pr2 f₂))
  (idpath (pr11 e))
  (pr2
     (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv
        (cod_adj_equiv_to_disp_adj_equiv e))) = pr2 e

(rinvunitor (pr2 f₁) • (runitor (pr2 f₁) • pr2 e)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_rinvunitor (pr2 f₁))
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 f₁)) (pr22 e)) =
pr2 e

  (pr11 e,,

   (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof c f₁ f₂ e,,

      e),,

     (pr122 (pr2 e)),,

        (internal_adjunction_data_identity c) (pr12 e))
     (pr222 (pr2 e)))

     (pr221 e)) = pr1 e

  (internal_adjoint_equivalence_identity c) f₁ f₂
pr1
  (pr11 e,,
   (pr111 (pr2 e),, pr112 (pr12 e),, pr122 (pr12 e)),,
   (cod_disp_adj_equiv_to_adj_equiv_subproof c f₁ f₂ e,,

      e),,
   from_is_disp_invertible_2cell_cod

     (pr122 (pr2 e)),,

     (pr222 (pr2 e))),,
(runitor (pr2 f₁)
 • ((rinvunitor (pr2 f₁) • pr121 e),,

f₂
≃ disp_adjoint_equivalence
    (idtoiso_2_0 c c (idpath c)) f₁ f₂
 exact (cod_adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₂
             ∘ weqtotal2 (make_weq _ (pr1 HB_2 _ _)) (cod_1cell_path (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₂)
             ∘ total2_paths_equiv _ _ _)%weq.
    
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
(cod_adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₂
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂))
        (pr1 HB_2 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)))
     (cod_1cell_path (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₂)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ d : trivial_displayed_bicat B B c,
      cod_disp_bicat_help B (c,, d)) f₁ f₂)%weq ~
disp_idtoiso_2_0 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath c) f₁ f₂

HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
p: transportf (λ z : B, cod_disp_bicat B z)
  (idpath c) f₁ = f₂
(cod_adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₂
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂))
        (pr1 HB_2 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)))
     (cod_1cell_path (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₂)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ d : trivial_displayed_bicat B B c,
      cod_disp_bicat_help B (c,, d)) f₁ f₂)%weq p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath c) f₁ f₂ p

HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁, f₂: cod_disp_bicat B c
p: f₁ = f₂
(cod_adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₂
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂))
        (pr1 HB_2 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₂)))
     (cod_1cell_path (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₂)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv
     (λ d : trivial_displayed_bicat B B c,
      cod_disp_bicat_help B (c,, d)) f₁ f₂)%weq p =
disp_idtoiso_2_0 (cod_disp_bicat B) (idpath c) f₁ f₂ p

f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c
(cod_adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₁
 ∘ weqtotal2
     (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₁))
        (pr1 HB_2 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₁)))
     (cod_1cell_path (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₁)
 ∘ total2_paths_equiv

  (idpath f₁) =

  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (idtoiso_2_0 c c (idpath c)))
B: bicat

pr1
  ((cod_adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₁
    ∘ weqtotal2
        (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₁))

    ∘ total2_paths_equiv
        (λ d : trivial_displayed_bicat B B c,
         cod_disp_bicat_help B (c,, d)) f₁ f₁)%weq
     (idpath f₁)) =
pr1
  (disp_idtoiso_2_0 (cod_disp_bicat B) 
     (idpath c) f₁ f₁ (idpath f₁))

  (disp_left_adjoint_equivalence
     (idtoiso_2_0 c c (idpath c)) x)

f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c

  ((cod_adj_equiv_weq_disp_adj_equiv (pr2 HB_2) f₁ f₁
    ∘ weqtotal2
        (make_weq (idtoiso_2_0 (pr1 f₁) (pr1 f₁))

    ∘ total2_paths_equiv
        (λ d : trivial_displayed_bicat B B c,

     f₁ (idpath f₁))

      
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c
id₁ (pr1 f₁),,
(runitor (pr2 f₁)
 • (id₂ (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁))),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 f₁))
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr2 f₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr2 f₁))) =
id₁ (pr1 f₁),,
(runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 f₁))
  (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr2 f₁))

HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c
(runitor (pr2 f₁)
 • (id₂ (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁))),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 f₁))
  (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr2 f₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr2 f₁))) =
(runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁)),,
is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
  (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 f₁))
  (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr2 f₁))

c: B
f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c
pr1
  ((runitor (pr2 f₁)
    • (id₂ (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁))),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 f₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr2 f₁))
        (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr2 f₁)))) =
pr1
  ((runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 f₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr2 f₁)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c
isPredicate is_invertible_2cell

        intro ; apply isaprop_is_invertible_2cell.
      
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c
pr1
  ((runitor (pr2 f₁)
    • (id₂ (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁))),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 f₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
        (is_invertible_2cell_id₂ (pr2 f₁))
        (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr2 f₁)))) =
pr1
  ((runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁)),,
   is_invertible_2cell_vcomp
     (is_invertible_2cell_runitor (pr2 f₁))
     (is_invertible_2cell_linvunitor (pr2 f₁)))

      
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c
runitor (pr2 f₁)
• (id₂ (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁)) =
runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁)

      
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
c: B
f₁: cod_disp_bicat B c
runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁) =
runitor (pr2 f₁) • linvunitor (pr2 f₁)

      apply idpath.
  Qed.

  
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
disp_univalent_2 (cod_disp_bicat B)

HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
disp_univalent_2 (cod_disp_bicat B)

HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
disp_univalent_2_0 (cod_disp_bicat B)

HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
disp_univalent_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B)

    
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
disp_univalent_2_0 (cod_disp_bicat B)
 exact (cod_disp_univalent_2_0 HB_2).
    
B: bicat
HB_2: is_univalent_2 B
disp_univalent_2_1 (cod_disp_bicat B)
 exact (cod_disp_univalent_2_1 (pr2 HB_2)).
  Defined.
End UnivalenceOfCodomain.
